owner_operator_stated: Website states the practice is led by Dr. Gregory R. Bertagna (35+ years in River Grove) and Dr. Frank M. Siracusa (general dentistry since 1989); it also mentions 'Doctors Soderquist' as incorporated into the practice. No mention of John A. Marsala anywhere on the site.
notes: Record entity is 'JOHN A. MARSALA D.D.S. ; LTD' but the record's address (8225 [W] Grand Ave) and exact phone ((708) 453-1110) match the current occupant's own site, rivergrove.dental, which identifies the practice as 'River Grove Dental Associates' (site footer claims 'Est. 1961'), led by Dr. Gregory Bertagna and Dr. Frank Siracusa. John Marsala is not mentioned anywhere on the corroborated site -- successor/rebrand, not a current John Marsala job lead.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Amy Mueller is the owner; her father Dr. Jay Mueller founded the practice in 2002 and still practices there with her; Dr. Armand Di Benedetto is listed as an associate.
notes: The record's own domain, jaymuellerdds.com, 302-redirects to muellerdentalassociates.com -- same address (57 E Hattendorf Ave #150, Roselle, IL 60172) and exact phone ((630) 529-1999) as the record. The practice rebranded to 'Mueller and Associates Family Dentistry' with Dr. Jay Mueller's daughter, Dr. Amy Mueller, now the owner; Jay Mueller himself is still listed as practicing there, so this is treated as a continuation, not an ownership conflict. No careers/hiring page found on the corroborated site.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Philip R. Frystak opened WisdomCare Dental in Roselle in January 2008; Drs. Phan and Zelichowski are listed as associate dentists.
notes: The vendor hint domain wisdomcaredental.com 301-redirects to the current site dentistroselleil.com, which matches the record's address exactly (21 W Irving Park Rd, Roselle, IL 60172); the site's own listed phone ((630) 529-5813) differs from the record's phone ((630) 582-7600), but the address match alone satisfies corroboration. No careers page in site navigation, though third-party job boards (SimplyHired) show a dental-assistant posting for this practice -- not counted here since it is not on the practice's own site.

owner_operator_stated: Historically 'Schaumburg Smiles' at this address was run by Dr. Harry Kiriluk and Dr. William Hardenbergh (per third-party listings); Yelp now marks the listing 'CLOSED' (updated July 2026). Dr. Hardenbergh's own domain, teethdoc.com, now 301-redirects to a NEW, unrelated practice site -- 'Hardenbergh Family Dentistry' at 746 S Buffalo Grove Rd, Buffalo Grove, IL 60089, phone (847) 537-1914 -- a different address and phone than this record.
notes: No live website corroborates this record's own address/phone (1622 E Algonquin Rd, Schaumburg, (847) 397-7161). The record's associated domain (teethdoc.com) now redirects entirely to Dr. Hardenbergh's new, differently-addressed Buffalo Grove practice, and Yelp lists the Schaumburg 'Schaumburg Smiles' listing as CLOSED. Treat as a closed/relocated location, not an active job lead at this address.

owner_operator_stated: Indexed content from the practice's own site (schaumburgsmile.net) states Dr. Milos (Mike) Milenkovich, DDS, a Loyola University Chicago graduate, runs Schaumburg Family Dental Clinic at 650 E Higgins Rd Ste 3W, Schaumburg, IL 60173, phone (847) 882-7001 -- an exact match to this record's phone. This is a DIFFERENT entity than the record name 'WEBSTER DENTAL CARE SCHAUMBURG, LTD.'
notes: Searching this record's exact phone, '(847) 882-7001', surfaces 'Schaumburg Family Dental Clinic' (Dr. Milenkovich) at 650 E Higgins Rd Ste 3W -- not Webster Dental Care. Webster Dental Care Schaumburg, Ltd is part of a multi-office DSO ('Webster Dental Management', webdentalchicago.com, careers via Paylocity); its own current locations page (Berwyn/Edison Park/Evanston/Hoffman Estates/La Grange Park/Lakeview/Portage Park/Skokie) does NOT include any Schaumburg office. A different suite in the same building (Ste 7E, phone (847) 882-8770) is still labeled 'Webster Dental Care of Schaumburg' on stale third-party directories (Yelp/PatientConnect365), but that phone does not match this record either. Direct WebFetch to schaumburgsmile.net failed on an expired TLS certificate; the address/phone/doctor facts above come from indexed search-result content of the practice's own domain.

owner_operator_stated: Site states Dr. Sahand Zomorrodian, D.M.D., M.S. (Tufts; prosthodontics training at UIC) is the owner/founder of Smile Pro Studio; Dr. Anne Marie Jardeleza, D.D.S. (UIC) is listed as an associate general dentist. This record's phone, (847) 517-1333, does NOT belong to Smile Pro Studio -- it is confirmed (via the AAO orthodontist locator) as the direct line for Dr. Matthew J. Busch, an orthodontist, at 1701 E Woodfield Rd Ste 500, Schaumburg -- a different, unrelated practice in the same office building.
notes: The vendor_website_hint (Clearchoice.Com) is wrong -- ClearChoice's actual Schaumburg office is at a different street number (1300 E Woodfield Rd), not this record's 1701 E Woodfield Rd. The record's address (1701 E Woodfield Rd) is corroborated by Smile Pro Studio's real site, dentistschaumburg.com (Suite 510, phone (847) 437-3533 -- different from the record's phone). Per the phone-search check, this record's exact phone number surfaces a DIFFERENT practice, Busch Orthodontics (Ste 500, same building) -- the phone field in this record appears to be cross-attributed to a neighboring specialist tenant rather than Smile Pro Studio. Smile Pro Studio has no careers page and is a multi-provider group (12 in vendor data; 2 corroborated on its own site) combining general dentistry and prosthodontics.
